calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-06-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-06-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: S.Vantree, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., for the Plaintiff MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC.

No appearance by Defendant MANUELA LOPEZ.
No Witnesses.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC. and against defendants MANUELA LOPEZ as follows:
Principal: $4,173.43
Costs/Fees:$336.00
Total Judgment:$4,509.43
All Doe defendants dismissed with prejudice.

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-23-2014 Set For Trial On Oct-06-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Establishing Admissions
Off Calendar Jun-10-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC's Motion For Order Establishing Admissions is granted. No opposition was filed. ORDER SIGNED. Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Establishing Admissions
Off Calendar Jun-02-2014 Continued To Jun-10-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Midland Funding, LLC's Motion For Order Establishing Admissions is continued to June 10, 2014 at 9:00 am to give Plaintiff the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than June 2, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
